reviews.review_title: great but i have a few suggestions
reviews.review_description: so your game is great and keep up the good work but if you can add more props, customizable robots, more actual buildings, and animating the characters would be really cool.
you need to make it where you can have multiple scenes and more posables and more props too

Love it want more editing places and able to make small movies with and maybe be able to put skin overlays on the character and unlimited props of all kinds and or be able to 3D scane in any objects from reall life
